meaning: n.阿拉伯数字,手指或足趾,一指宽(约四分之三英寸)
examples: Australia had 15 years of double-digit inflation.
Her telephone number differs from mine by one digit.
"With the first subject, after about 20 hours of training, his digit span had risen from 7 to 20," Ericsson recalls.
Its double-digit growth in sales and operating income, says Osorio, makes it worth a steep price.
To do so, Beijing would have to create double-digit increases in the second half of the year.
